author: anon-581fd578
content: Preserving the scope across rebuilds causes create_effect/create_memo/batch to accumulate N copies after N frames. All fire simultaneously on signal changes, creating cascading updates that corrupt rendering. Fix: revert to new-scope-per-frame. use_persisted signals survive because they use create_unscoped_signal (not owned by any scope). Effects/memos are properly cleaned up each frame.
